name: numtype
description: NumType — n-dimensional arrays for TypeScript with compile-time shape checking (research spike)
author: crankfunk

scripts.build:dist: pnpm build:wasm && rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/postbuild-dist.mjs && mkdir -p dist/wasm && cp spike/src/wasm/numtype_core.wasm dist/wasm/numtype_core.wasm
scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --manifest-path crates/core/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p spike/src/wasm && cp crates/core/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/numtype_core.wasm spike/src/wasm/numtype_core.wasm
scripts.test:core: pnpm build:wasm && node --test --test-timeout=120000 spike/tests-runtime/add.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/argmax-topk.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/backend-oom.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/fill.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/matmul.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/negative-paths.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/s1-import-guard.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/scalar-mean.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/sum.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/test-scripts-guard.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/transpose.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/zero-dep-guard.test.ts
scripts.test:package: pnpm build:dist && node scripts/check-dist-emit.mjs && node --test --test-timeout=120000 spike/tests-package/package-smoke.test.ts && tsc -p spike/tests-package/consumer/tsconfig.json
scripts.test:resident: pnpm build:wasm && node --test --test-timeout=120000 spike/tests-runtime/resident.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/resident-lifecycle.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/resident-gc.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/fromarray-overload.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/strided.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/strided-lifecycle.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/blocked.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/slice.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/elementwise.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/vector.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/reshape.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/keepdims.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/special-values.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/backend-api.test.ts
scripts.test:threaded: pnpm build:wasm && pnpm build:wasm:threads && node --test --test-timeout=120000 spike/tests-runtime/threaded.test.ts spike/tests-runtime/backend-api-threaded.test.ts
scripts.test:browser: pnpm build:wasm && rm -rf spike/tests-browser/.emit && pnpm exec tsc -p spike/tests-browser/tsconfig.emit.json && mkdir -p spike/tests-browser/.emit/src/wasm && cp spike/src/wasm/numtype_core.wasm spike/tests-browser/.emit/src/wasm/numtype_core.wasm && pnpm exec playwright test spike/tests-browser/smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:example: pnpm -C examples/rag-demo install --frozen-lockfile && node scripts/check-example-registry-drift.mjs && pnpm -C examples/rag-demo run check && pnpm -C examples/rag-demo run demo
